sections.paragraph:
Original: תּחפּנס תּחפנחס תּחפּנחס o

Transliteration: tachpanchês techaphnechês tachpenês

Phonetic: takh-pan-khace'

BDB Definition:

Tahpanhes or Tahapanes or Tehaphnehes = "thou will fill hands with pity"
  1. a city in Egypt; modern 'Tel Defenneh' or 'Tel Defneh' located approx 18 miles (29 kilometers) east southeast from Tanis

Origin: of Egyptian derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
